title: Turf
description: Decorative grass blocks that you can dye.
body: Turf is a simple decorative mod. With grass you can craft yourself Turf, which is just a decorative grass block. It takes the appearance and color of normal grass and blends with it. You can craft Turf into slabs, stairs and walls, as well as dye it in any of the 16 colors (which can also be made into slabs, stairs and walls). Because Turf uses the vanilla grass texture, it is fully compatible with any resource pack! **Why would I use this over vanilla 1.17+ moss?** It's seamless with grass (moss looks slightly different), matches grass biome color, can be dyed, and has stairs, slabs, and walls.
